items.title: More reliable synced lists
items.description: Hardened background error reporting and local-to-cloud migration retry handling so list data stays safer when network or Firebase operations fail.

items.title: Cleaner sharing and member flows
items.description: Refined shared-list permissions, email sharing validation, and member management paths for more predictable collaboration.

items.title: Account deletion request link
items.description: Added an account deletion request option in Profile > About to make account cleanup easier to find.
